final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial landscape photography, fine art print
Primary request: pristine old-growth forest at dawn with volumetric light rays piercing through canopy
Scene/backdrop: ancient primeval forest interior, moss-covered boulders, winding mountain stream with crystal-clear water reflecting emerald vegetation, distant misty mountain silhouettes
Subject: foreground ferns and wild mushrooms, midground towering redwood trunks reaching skyward, background layered mountain ridges fading into mist
Style/medium: landscape photography, wide-angle lens, pronounced depth of field
Composition/framing: wide-angle establishing shot, foreground-to-background layering, strong depth of field with sharp focus throughout
Lighting/mood: early morning golden hour, dramatic crepuscular rays (Tyndall effect) streaming through dense canopy, soft atmospheric haze, mysterious and serene mood
Color palette: deep forest green, vivid emerald, golden amber sunlight, cool misty blue-gray in background
Materials/textures: velvety moss on weathered stone, delicate fern fronds, smooth wet river stones, rough bark texture of redwoods
Constraints: preserve the layered depth from foreground mushrooms to distant mountains, maintain the ethereal quality of light beams through mist
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial sharpening halos, plastic-looking vegetation, lens flare artifacts, watermark
